metadata.description: Custom Claude Code plugins by Alzarak

plugins.name: copilot-declarative-agent
plugins.description: Create, validate, and manage Microsoft 365 Copilot Declarative Agents. Comprehensive toolkit with scaffolding, validation, instruction optimization, and schema management.

plugins.name: nsight-scripter
plugins.description: Create, edit, read, and manage N-Able N-Sight RMM Automation Manager (.amp) policy files and PowerShell scripts for N-Sight Script Manager.
